zh.lifeSummary: 當Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen於1305年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根時，他的父親Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen37歲，母親Rixa von Werle37歲。他於1341年10月4日與Elisabeth Von Hessen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年5月2日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen于1305年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根时，他的父亲Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen37岁，母亲Rixa von Werle37岁。他于1341年10月4日与Elisabeth Von Hessen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年5月2日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可。

nameMeanings.name: Ernst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ern(e)st ‘serious business, fight to the death’.

nameMeanings.name: Herzog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Heinz, Kurt, Otto, Wolfgang, Franz, Arno, Ernst, Hildegarde, Reinhold.

German: from the Middle High German title of nobility herzoge ‘duke’ (Old High German herizoho, from heri ‘army’ + ziohan ‘to lead’, a calque of the Byzantine title stratēlatēs ‘general, commander’, from Greek stratos ‘army’ + elaunein ‘to lead’). The name is unlikely to refer to descent from an actual duke; it is normally an occupational name for the servant of a duke or a nickname for one who put on the airs and graces of a duke. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia (see also 3 below). Compare Hertzog .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Herzog ‘duke’ (see 1 above). Compare Graf and Kaiser .

variants.name: Herceg
meanings: Croatian: nickname from herceg ‘duke’, a title of the medieval feudal lords of Herzegovina (‘duke's land’, a region in Bosnia and Herzegovina), derived from the Hungarian form of German Herzog . Compare Erceg .

variants.name: Herczeg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Imre, Laszlo, Tibor, Attila, Ferenc, Gaza, Istvan, Janos.

variants.name: Herzig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Fritzi, Hans, Horst, Markus, Monika.
German (eastern and central Germany and Silesia, Switzerland): variant of   Herzog  .
German: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed with hard ‘strong, hardy’, for instance Herto.

variants.name: Hertzog
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Herzog and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Hertzog is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Hartsock
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsoe
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Herzog  .

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ivo  , derived from the oblique case of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen was born in 1305, in Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, his father, Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen, was 37 and his mother, Rixa von Werle, was 37. He married Elisabeth Von Hessen on 4 October 1341. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 2 May 1367, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen est né en 1305, à Göttingen, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Rixa von Werle, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Von Hessen le 4 octobre 1341. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Einbeck, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen 1305 in Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen 37 und seine Mutter Rixa von Werle 37. Er hat am 4. Oktober 1341 Elisabeth Von Hessen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1367 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen è nato il nel 1305 nel Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Rixa von Werle, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Von Hessen il 4 ottobre 1341. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingenが1305年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーグoッティンジェンで生まれた時，父Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhenは37歳，母Rixa von Werleは37歳であった。1341年10月4日にElisabeth Von Hessenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年5月2日に故郷で62歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーエインベックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen(이)가 1305년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 그o틴겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Rixa von Werle(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1341년 10월 4일 Elisabeth Von Hessen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 5월 2일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡에 묻혔다.

pt.Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany: Kreis Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen nasceu em 1305, em Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Rixa von Werle, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Von Hessen em 4 de outubro de 1341. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1367, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen родился в 1305 г. в местности гoттинген, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Rixa von Werle, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Von Hessen 4 октября 1341 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 2 мая 1367 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen nació en 1305, en Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Rixa von Werle, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Von Hessen el 4 de octubre de 1341. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania.
